creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
liferea-1.10.8_1 "works for me", I even recompiled it just to make sure I have the current version, but I'm not able to reproduce the problem.
It has been assumed that the crash is related to the tray icon, but I don't have a tray, so perhaps that's why it's working for me? (What windowmanager besides metacity does provide a tray? I only have FvwmButtons, and I'm quite happy with that.)
Has anyone tried to use liferea without tray icon? The setting should be reachable as gconf key "/apps/liferea/trayicon".
